LayoutObject.name: Title icon
Explore chapter

Calculation.Text: FAT Overview::Hierarchy Level ≤ FAT Title::gView hierarchy level Title Explorer And (FAT Overview::Package group = FAT Title::gView Package group Title Or FAT Title::gView Package group Title = "") /*FAT Overview::Hierarchy Level ≤ User X Title @ Title::View hierarchy level Title and (FAT Overview::Package group = User X Title @ Title::View Package group Title or User X Title @ Title::View Package group Title = "")*/

LayoutObject.name: Package Rect
Package type icon
Package type icon

Calculation.Text: SetProperty ( "item_id" ; FAT Overview::Item id) & SetProperty ( "item_type" ; FAT Overview::Item type )

LayoutObject.name: Page item info 2

Calculation.Text: Not IsEmpty (FAT Page item @ Overview::Media 1) Or Not IsEmpty (FAT Page item @ Overview::Media 2)
IsEmpty (FAT Page item @ Overview::Media 1) And IsEmpty (FAT Page item @ Overview::Media 2)

LayoutObject.name: Page info 2
Chapter info 2
Package info

StyledText.Data: Package type <<FAT Package @ Overview::Package type name>>

LayoutObject.name: Page item info 2

Calculation.Text: Not IsEmpty (FAT Page item @ Overview::Media 1) Or Not IsEmpty (FAT Page item @ Overview::Media 2)
IsEmpty (FAT Page item @ Overview::Media 1) And IsEmpty (FAT Page item @ Overview::Media 2)

Chapter info 2
Package info

StyledText.Data: Package type <<FAT Package @ Overview::Package type name>>
